# fpcloud_service_account_key (Resource)

Manages a Fogpipe service account key.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `service_account_id` (String) The service account this key belongs to.

### Read-Only

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) The API key (only available at creation time).
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp when the key was created.
- `id` (String) Key ID.
- `prefix` (String) Key prefix for identification.
